allow: Bash(python -c "from ipcam_checker.config import Settings; s = Settings\(\); print\(f'Settings created: {s}'\)")
Bash(python -c "from ipcam_checker.config import Settings; s = Settings\(\); assert s.ping_count == 4; assert s.bin_dir == Path\('bin'\); print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from pathlib import Path; from ipcam_checker.config import Settings; s = Settings\(\); assert s.ping_count == 4; assert s.bin_dir == Path\('bin'\); print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python -c "from pathlib import Path; from ipcam_checker._ffmpeg import ensure_ffmpeg; ff, fp = ensure_ffmpeg\(Path\('bin'\)\); print\('ffmpeg:', ff\); print\('ffprobe:', fp\); print\('exists:', ff.exists\(\), fp.exists\(\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from ipcam_checker._ffmpeg import ensure_ffmpeg; from pathlib import Path; ff, fp = ensure_ffmpeg\(Path\('bin'\)\); assert ff.exists\(\); assert fp.exists\(\); print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from ipcam_checker.plugins import AbstractPlugin, PluginRegistry; print\('ok'\)")
Bash(python -c "from ipcam_checker import check_camera, check_cameras, CameraConfig, Settings; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(FILTER_BRANCH_SQUELCH_WARNING=1 git filter-branch -f --msg-filter "python -c \\"import sys; msg=sys.stdin.read\(\); print\('\\n'.join\(l for l in msg.splitlines\(\) if not l.startswith\('Co-Authored-By:'\)\).rstrip\(\)\)\\"" -- --all)
